info.title: Siteglide Site API
info.description:
API for interacting with your Siteglide site.

To test, authorize with your apiKey and siteID.

Looking for our Portal API? Click here

To find documentation for v1.1.2 of Siteglide API, which is now deprecated, please follow this link - v1.1.2 API docs (deprecated)

Roadmap

siteID.name: x-site-id
siteID.description: The ID of the Siteglide site you are working with (not an API key — just the numeric site ID)

get.summary: Retrieve an overview list of all form cases from your website

parameters.name: form
parameters.description: The form ID which the cases are linked to.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items to retireve, maximum of 500

parameters.name: sort_type
parameters.description: Field by which to sort the results. Use `id`, `created_at`, or `updated_at` for system fields, or a custom field ID (e.g. `form_field_1_1`).

customField.summary: Sort by a custom field using its field ID

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Order of results

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page to retrieve number, to be used with per_page

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - The form does not contain any cases

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid

get.summary: Retrieve all data about an individual form case

parameters.name: form
parameters.description: The ID of your form

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the case

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - Case does not exist

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid

post.summary: Create a case against a specific user

parameters.name: form
parameters.description: The ID of your form

requestBody.description: Your Cases custom fields as a JSON object

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - Case does not exist

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results to retrieve, maximum of 500

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve, used with per_page

parameters.name: sort_type
parameters.description: Property by which to sort results

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Order of results (asc or desc)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter pages by field values

dateExists.summary: Has a deleted_at value (i.e. is soft-deleted)

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or invalid

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the page

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - Page does not exist

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or invalid

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the page to update

merge_metadata.description: When true (default), merges provided metadata with existing metadata. When false, replaces it entirely.

enabled.description: Toggling to false automatically sets redirect_to to /404. Toggling back to true removes it.

slug.description: Must be unique. Only validated if the slug is being changed.

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - Page does not exist

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or invalid

physical_file_path.description: Unique identifier for the page file. Must match pattern [a-zA-Z0-9\-\_\/\.]+, start with views/pages/ or modules/, and end with .liquid.

name.description: The display name of the page

enabled.description: Whether the page is enabled. Defaults to true. If false, redirect_to is automatically set to /404.

file_type.description: Defaults to 'page'. Use 'system_page' for system pages.

seo_searchable.description: Whether the page is indexed by search engines. Defaults to true.

secure_zones.description: Array of secure zone IDs to restrict access

user_roles.description: Comma-separated role IDs for access control

slug.description: URL slug for the page. Derived from physical_file_path if not provided. Must be unique.

response_headers.description: Custom response headers as key-value pairs

searchable.description: Whether the page is searchable. Defaults to true.

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or invalid

parameters.description: Number of items to retireve, maximum of 500

parameters.name: sort_type

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Order of results

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page to retrieve number, to be used with per_page

get.summary: Retrieve all data about an individual product

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Product

403.description: Forbidden - You cannot access this site

404.description: Not Found - Product does not exist

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Product Item ID

requestBody.description: Your Products custom fields as a JSON object. When updating Attributes and Attribute Options, if you do not provide an ID then a new item will be made. Providing a valid ID will update the existing item. For more information on Product Database structure, please see this document

400.description: Bad Request - The API could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid

requestBody.description: Your Products custom fields as a JSON object. For more information on Product Database structure, please see this document

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Required data missing or data invalid
